title: nothorhipsalis houlletiana subsp. regnellii
intro: Nothorhipsalis houlletiana subsp. regnellii, also known as the 'Peruvian Apple Cactus', is a rare and unique plant species within the cactus family that has adapted to grow in the wild and can be cultivated indoors. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Nothorhipsalis houlletiana subsp. regnellii include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and even aiding in the treatment of certain types of cancer. In herbal preparations, this plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
